title: きゅんきゅんティータイム！？

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"Prettiest Dream. Tea like you've never tasted
before..." I wonder what it's like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No way I could go to a place like that just to try
it, though...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-no, it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That day after class...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Should I check out the cafe? No, it's too cute, I
can't—
choice_data_list: If you want to go, we should go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa! You again?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: D-did you hear me just now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It's not like I want to go. I was just a little curious!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's not like I really want to go. I was just a
little curious...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I read in a magazine that it has good tea—that's
all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I read in a magazine that it has good tea—that's
all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait a mi—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-we really came...

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! ♪ What will you be having today,
lovelies?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: "L-lovelies"?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I'll have the, uh... Prettiest Dream.

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you have exquisite taste, honey. ♪ That
adorable tea is exclusive to our cafe!

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ Coming right up, darlings!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I really don't fit in here...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
It is! I don't belong in the same sentence as words
like "cute" or "darling."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't have to say things just to be nice! I
know better than anyone that I don't belong here.

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text: Here are your Prettiest Dreams, sweethearts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text: Here are your Prettiest Dreams, sweethearts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Now, repeat after me so we can cast a spell over
your tea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Let's elevate your Prettiest Dreams! Make a heart
with your hands, and...

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Lovely, lovely beam! ♪ Make this tea taste like a
dream! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! That was so adorable! ♪ Now it's
your turn!

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! That was so adorable! ♪ Now it's
your turn!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: N-no way! I'm not cut out for this kind of—
choice_data_list: Do it for the sake of delicious tea!
You can just say it in your own words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! I know this is why we came all this way, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text: Let's go! You can do it, dearie! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, fine, I'll do it! But cover your ears,
Trainer! And close your eyes too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Inhale...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Lovely, lovely beam... ♪ Make this tea taste like a
dream... ♪

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how curious! ♪ Thanks to your magic, this tea
has become even more delicious, honey! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I can't even tell what this tastes like
anymore...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My one saving grace is that you didn't hear me
say that spell...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...You didn't hear me say that, right? You heard
nothing, right?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I had covered my ears, I was still
able to hear her chant... but I decide to keep that
to myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though I had covered my ears, I was still
able to hear her chant... but I decide to keep that
to myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: My own words?

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's a great idea. ♪ As long as you pour
your feelings into your spell, I'm sure the tea will
become more delicious, sweetie!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-here I go, then...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: B-become tastier... Please!

text_block_list.name: Cute Waitress
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ♪ Your original spell was so adorable, love!
And look, the tea's absolutely delighted!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-it wasn't adorable at all!
choice_data_list: Now our tea is nice and delicious.
Now our tea is nice and delicious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: As if that's how it works...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, it is delicious... Did it really work?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She likes the tea so much, she decides to buy
some leaves... but she won't tell me if she casts a
spell over the tea at home.
